ticket.subject: Billing Problem
ticket.description:
Last week we changed to a paid subscription for Shipping Services.

 

We did not get confirmation our order went through so we tried it multiple times.

 

Now we have multiple charges on our credit card, $29.00 each. Please credit $58.00 to our credit card for the multiple charges.

 

Thank you,

 

Tim Boettcher

303.744.3505

True Pump & Equipment, Inc.

1429 S. Broadway

Denver, CO  80210

www.truepump.com (http://www.truepump.com/)

comments.body:
Hello Tim Boettcher,

Apologies for the inconvenience caused.

I’d be happy to review this and assist you further. Could you please share the relevant statement or transaction IDs so we can investigate this more quickly?

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Need assistance from L3 team

**Case:** Request to verify if any duplicate payments were made.

**Details:**
The customer is on the $29 Popular plan (WSS). They mentioned that they did not receive a subscription activation confirmation, so they attempted the activation multiple times.

The customer now reports that they have been charged multiple times on their credit card and is requesting a refund.

From our end, we were unable to identify any duplicate payments in the backend. Could you please review this from your end and confirm?

**Store Details:**
Store URL – https://truepump.com
Account ID – 9527a190-b2da-4c08-bea6-2801fad39cf9

Current Payment Subscription ID – sub_1TOeWXDOl8P0Ke60FqdEi5u4

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/IJ6mkDrNdvN4HzYUQzSycgCCl/?name=image.png)
comments.html_body:
Need assistance from L3 team
 
Case: Request to verify if any duplicate payments were made.
 
Details:
The customer is on the $29 Popular plan (WSS). They mentioned that they did not receive a subscription activation confirmation, so they attempted the activation multiple times.
 
The customer now reports that they have been charged multiple times on their credit card and is requesting a refund.
 
From our end, we were unable to identify any duplicate payments in the backend. Could you please review this from your end and confirm?
 
Store Details:
Store URL – https://truepump.com
Account ID – 9527a190-b2da-4c08-bea6-2801fad39cf9
 
Current Payment Subscription ID – sub_1TOeWXDOl8P0Ke60FqdEi5u4
